wine_hotels.name: Hotel Marques de Riscal, a Luxury Collection Hotel
wine_hotels.category: 5-star Luxury Collection hotel at a working winery
wine_hotels.wine_program: Winery tours of the historic Catedral del Vino cellar, tastings of Riscal Rioja and Rueda, plus a Vinotherapie Caudalie spa
wine_hotels.description: Frank Gehry's titanium-ribbon hotel over the Marques de Riscal cellars in Elciego, with winery tours, a Caudalie wine spa and Michelin dining.

wine_hotels.name: Hotel Viura
wine_hotels.address: Calle Herreria 19 A, 01307 Villabuena de Alava, Alava, Spain
wine_hotels.wine_program: Own cellar showcasing the 43 wineries of Villabuena at winery prices, with tastings and pairings of local Rioja
wine_hotels.description: Cube-stacked design hotel in Villabuena de Alava with a rooftop terrace over the vines and a cellar drawn from the village's 43 wineries.

verified.address_quoted: Herreria 19 A Villabuena de Alava, 01307 Alava, Espana

wine_hotels.name: Hotel Eguren Ugarte
wine_hotels.category: Boutique winery hotel over cellar tunnels
wine_hotels.wine_program: Sleep above 2 km of cellar tunnels; tastings, winery tours and harvest participation paired with two estate restaurants
wine_hotels.description: Family winery hotel in Paganos built over 2 km of cellar tunnels, with vineyard-view rooms, tastings and harvest stays in Rioja Alavesa.

wine_hotels.name: Hotel Bodega Finca de los Arandinos
wine_hotels.address: Carretera LP-137 Km 4.6, 26375 Entrena, La Rioja, Spain
wine_hotels.wine_program: Integrated winery, restaurant Tierra and spa; rooms overlook fermentation tanks and the barrel hall, with tastings of the estate wines
wine_hotels.description: First Rioja project to fuse winery, hotel, restaurant and spa in one estate at Entrena, with vineyard-view rooms above the barrel hall.

wine_hotels.name: Eurostars Los Agustinos
wine_hotels.address: Calle San Agustin 2, 26200 Haro, La Rioja, Spain
wine_hotels.wine_program: El Claustro restaurant with a strong Rioja cellar; a base for the Haro Barrio de la Estacion bodegas
wine_hotels.description: Hotel in a 1373 former monastery in central Haro, with a cloister restaurant, a deep Rioja wine list and easy reach of the station bodegas.

wine_hotels.name: Hotel Echaurren Relais & Chateaux
wine_hotels.address: Calle Padre Jose Garcia 19, 26280 Ezcaray, La Rioja, Spain
wine_hotels.wine_program: Home of two-Michelin-star El Portal de Echaurren with a 1,000-plus-reference cellar plus the traditional Echaurren Tradicion table
wine_hotels.description: Fifth-generation Paniego Relais & Chateaux hotel in Ezcaray, built around the two-star El Portal restaurant and its deep Rioja-led cellar.

wine_hotels.name: Hotel Villa de Laguardia
wine_hotels.address: Paseo de San Raimundo 15, 01300 Laguardia, Alava, Spain
wine_hotels.wine_program: Wine Oil Spa with vinotherapy treatments across 1,000 sqm, plus an attached winery and restaurant five minutes from walled Laguardia
wine_hotels.description: Spa hotel just outside walled Laguardia with a 1,000 sqm Wine Oil Spa, an attached winery and a restaurant, a comfortable Rioja Alavesa base.
